name: Sapa Trekking & Ethnic Market 3 days
duration: Places:Cat Cat Village - Lao Chai Village - Ta Van Village - Bac Ha Market
highlights: Immerse yourself in the vibrant culture of Bac Ha Market and captivate the landscapes in Muong Hoa Valley
Explore the colorful handcrafted products and regional delicacies from diverse ethnic communities
Engage with the friendly locals and gain an authentic insight into their fascinating way of life in ethnic minority villages

itinerary.title: Sapa - Cat Cat Village Trekking
itinerary.description:
Morning & Afternoon

Take a leisurely walk at Cat Cat Village which is well-known not just for its beautiful surroundings, but also for the ethnic mix of its population. You can preserve the beauty of the people and the valley's spectacular natural landscape here via photographs. We'll look at the hidden beauty of a Hydroelectric Power Station. Built by the French in 1925, this is one of the first hydroelectric plants in Vietnam and Indochina. Return to Sapa town by bus

itinerary.title: Y Linh Ho - Lao Chai - Ta Van Village Trekking
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Begin your adventure in Muong Hoa Valley with a 5-kilometer hike through Y Linh Ho Village. When visiting the village, you will view the magnificent Hoang Lien Son mountain range as well as the lovely, innocent ethnic minority children dressed in distinctive brocade clothing. As you approach Lao Chai Village, discover the attractive Black Hmong people and be over the moon by the gorgeous wide angle of terraced fields. We will continue our journey to Ta Van Village, home to the Giay ethnic group, to hear some of the most amazing folk stories. Ta Van Village is home to many different e...

itinerary.title: Bac Ha Market - Lao Cai - Hanoi
itinerary.description:
Morning

Start your day by enjoying breakfast and packing up your luggage for check-out. Feel the quintessence and uniqueness of the culture of the Dao, Mong, and Nung ethnic people when visiting Bac Ha Market. Admire the amazing brocade products and buy your loved ones some unique souvenirs. Afternoon

After lunch, take a leisurely stroll to Hoang A Tuong's Palace, an exquisite mansion hundreds of years old, and observe the amazing Asian-European architectural style. After that, we'll pay a visit to the Flower H'Mong ethnic group in Ban Pho Village and sample some of their special corn wine

included: All entrance tickets to indicated sites
Meals as indicated in the program (2 Breakfasts; 2 Lunches)
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
Bac Ha Market is opened on Sunday only. If you want to visit the market, you should departure on Thursday.
